dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6650 IH: Veterans Career Connection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Kiggans of Virginia (for herself, Mr. Bell, Mr. Bacon, and Mr. Neguse) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to establish a program under which the Secretary of Veterans Affairs provides information regarding the professional experiences of certain veterans and members of the Armed Forces to prospective employers.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Veterans Career Connection Act.

Chapter 41 of title 38, United States Code, is amended by inserting, before section 4112, the following new section 4111 (and amending the table of sections at the beginning of such chapter accordingly):

subsection.text: The Secretary shall carry out a program to provide information regarding an individual described in subsection (b) to an entity that seeks to employ an individual with skills or experience possessed by such an individual. Such program shall be referred to as the Veterans Transition Talent Hub.
An individual described in this subsection is an individual who—

paragraph.text: elects to participate in the program under this section; and

subparagraph.text: a member of the Armed Forces who is eligible for preseparation counseling under section 1142 of title 10.

subsection.text: The Secretary shall allow an entity that the Secretary determines appropriate to search data regarding individuals described in subsection (b). Such data includes the following with regards to such an individual:

paragraph.text: The anticipated date of the discharge or release from active duty in the Armed Forces.
The military and civilian skills, certifications, or credentials.

subsection.text: In carrying out the program under this section, the Secretary shall seek to consult with the following:

paragraph.text: Veterans service organizations recognized under section 5902 of this title.
